response:
Database created successfully.

**Benchmark Tasks** database URL: `https://www.notion.so/0842ff74bac94bb2927f8b47a7f821ca`

Note: The Support Docs page was archived, so the database was created at the workspace level instead. It has all 4 columns:
- **Name** (title)
- **Status** (select: To Do/In Progress/Done)
- **Priority** (number)
- **Due Date** (date)
